历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5643 → 6251 → 4876 → 11400 → 7539, with significant fluctuations in recent years: in 2024, it dropped sharply to 11400, and in 2025, it rebounded significantly to 7539, with a baseline of about 7539 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guizhou Province was 92 in 2021, 93 in 2022, 95 in 2023, 96 in 2024, and 91 in 2025; in 2026, the plan increased sharply to 113, an expansion of about 24.2% compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 41st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 40–43 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier 211 group; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to historical laboratory safety incidents raising campus safety concerns; Douyin popularity ranking is 45th (relatively popular), with some exposure on short video platforms, overall application attention is moderately high; Systems Science A+ (first in the country), Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, with a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, strong engineering strength, which strongly attracts applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other majors continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with BJTU's advantageous disciplines; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 208,400, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025 (207,200), with slightly intensified competition; provincial control line data for 2026 is missing; Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to candidates from the southwestern region; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guizhou Province accounts for a large proportion (113 in 2026), making it an important source of students in the southwestern region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7539, the significant expansion of about 24.2% in 2026 (easing competition), the slight increase in Physics Category candidates in the province (intensifying competition), the somewhat negative reputation but strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, and the slight increase in candidate scale and the popularity of engineering majors, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum ranking is about 8583, with a range of 8083–9083.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 8583, with a range of 8083–9083. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (8083) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class and Computer Class; those with rankings in the middle of the range (around 8500) should target Tier 2 Electronic Information Class, Transportation Class, and Automation Class as main directions; those with rankings near the upper limit of the range (9083) are advised to use Tier 3 Economics and Management Experimental Class and Civil Engineering Class as safety options, while also considering relatively lower-ranked majors in Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 999 → 1223 → 1669 → 2024 → 1403, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend: from 2021 to 2024, it moved back year by year (999 → 2024), and in 2025 it significantly rebounded to 1403rd place, with the 2025 baseline around 1403rd place; the university's enrollment plan in Guizhou Province for liberal arts/history category was 7 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 10 in 2024, and reduced to 5 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 6 students, a slight increase of 20% compared to 2025, but the number of planned students remains at a historical low.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 41st in the 2026 main list of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to historical laboratory safety incidents attracting attention; Douyin popularity ranking is 45th (relatively hot), with overall attention at a medium-high level; strong engineering advantages such as System Science A+ and Transportation Engineering A, but few liberal arts enrollment majors (only the Liberal Arts Experimental Class Economic Management Talent Pilot Program in 2025), with Management Science and Engineering A- supporting economics and management majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Foreign Languages is generally wait-and-see; the estimated number of history category examinees in this province in 2026 is about 90,600, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025 (90,100); provincial control line data for 2026 is missing; Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for liberal arts examinees; the university's enrollment plan for history category in Guizhou Province is small (only 6 students in 2026), belonging to small-scale enrollment, with high sensitivity to ranking fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1403rd place, a slight 20% enrollment expansion in 2026 (easing competition), a slight increase in the number of history category examinees in this province (intensifying competition), a somewhat negative reputation but small enrollment scale, and factors such as a slight increase in examinee numbers and differentiation in liberal arts major popularity, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1601st place, with a range of 1361–1841.

The university's enrollment scale for history category in Guizhou Province is extremely small (only 6 students in 2026), and only offers one enrollment major, the Liberal Arts Experimental Class, so application options are limited. Candidates with rankings within the lower bound of the range (1361st place) can actively apply; those with rankings in the middle of the range (around 1600th place) can try to aim; those with rankings near the upper bound (1841st place) should be cautious.
